case_title: VIKAS HOTEL, LLC VS. KENDALL BROWN ET AL

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VIKAS HOTEL, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, KENDALL

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, KENDALL

DECLARATION OF UNAVAILABLE THREE DAY NOTICE TO PAY RENT OR QUIT AND THIRTY DAY NOTICE OF TERMINATION OF TENACY AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF VIKAS HOTEL, LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VIKAS HOTEL, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN, KENDALL DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 374 5TH STREET #310, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94107, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $550.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $169.00 AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, KENDALL
DECLARATION OF LOST OR OTHERWISE UNAVAILABLE ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT, NOTICE AND PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF VIKAS HOTEL, LLC

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, KENDALL
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VIKAS HOTEL, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN, KENDALL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: POSSESSION NO LONGER AT-ISSUE $257.00 RENT, $550.00 COSTS, $396.68 HOLDOVER CHARGES, $169.00 CREDIT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,034.68, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VIKAS HOTEL, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, KENDALL DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, KENDALL DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IS $8.44 FILED BY PLAINTIFF VIKAS HOTEL, LLC
